friends.empty.title: Pray together.
friends.empty.body: Invite a friend to start a streak that grows the more you both pray.
friends.detail.removeConfirm.title: Remove friend?
friends.detail.removeConfirm.body: Your shared streak will end. You can re-invite later.
friends.detail.blockConfirm.title: Block this friend?
friends.detail.blockConfirm.body: They will no longer see you in their friends list. You can unblock from settings.
invites.regenerateConfirm: Replace your current code with a new one? The old link will stop working.
invites.whatsAppMessage: Salaam! Join me on Sukoon and let's keep our 5 daily Salah streak alive together. Tap to install + accept: {url}
accept.title: Pray together?
accept.subtitle: {name} wants to start a Salah streak with you.
accept.errors.invalid: This invite link is no longer valid.
accept.errors.expired: This invite expired. Ask your friend for a fresh one.
accept.errors.used: This invite has already been used.
accept.errors.self: You cannot accept your own invite.
accept.errors.blocked: You can't add this person right now.
accept.errors.network: Couldn't reach the server. Please try again.
